_comment: Red/green ratchet manifest (docs/sdds/api-layering-sdd.md, 'Execution: the top-down red/green loop'). Schema and strict rules: targets-README.md. targets[]: { id, wp, corpus, status: 'red' | 'green' }. suites[]: { corpus, command[] } — command runs from the repo root, prints one JSON line { "id": "...", "pass": true|false } per target on stdout, and exits 0.
